response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong Staff-level software engineering experience with highly relevant current work in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP), aligning directly with key GenAI technologies and primary responsibilities. Their extensive background in full-stack development, technical leadership, and commitment to engineering excellence makes them a compelling candidate. While the explicit 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions experience and Python proficiency are not fully evident, their deep experience with agentic systems and strong general engineering skills are highly valuable for this forward-deployed role.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Strong technical leadership, mentoring, and full-stack engineering background.
Extensive experience with TypeScript, cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and robust software development practices (TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Less than 8 years of explicitly stated production-grade AI solutions development.
Lack of explicit experience with Python, a common language in AI/ML.
No explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures.
